name: cde-governance
title: Policy & Governance Coverage
description: CDE-authored — governed % by source, governance-status mix & ungoverned assets by source over PDC-BIDB-EXT.

dataAccesses.name: GovPctBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS governed_pct FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: GovStatusMix
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(regexp_replace(s.governance_coverage_status,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),''),'Unknown') AS status, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: UngovBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, SUM(s.ungoverned_entity_count) AS ungoverned FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
